---
title: "Population-based studies in transgender health"
---

<span class="status-badge">Ongoing</span> <span class="listing-tags">Epidemiology</span> <span class="listing-tags">Registry studies</span>

## Background

We conduct large-scale population studies using Swedish health registries to investigate the prevalence, incidence, and long-term health outcomes of individuals with gender dysphoria. By linking multiple national registers, we can study health trajectories across time with high completeness and minimal recall bias.

Placeholder: expand with study rationale, data sources, and research questions.

## Team

- Fotis Papadopoulos, Principal Investigator
- Georgios Karamanis, Epidemiological analysis
- Alexander Engberg, Statistical analysis
- Placeholder: additional collaborators

## Key outputs

### Publications

- Placeholder: key papers from this project.

### Data & code

- Placeholder: links to analysis code or data availability statements.
